name: Your new mate for life!
description:
"Cute. Mine now."

Rundown: You go to the jungle in one of the most beautiful parts of the world, but when you get there, you find your new mate for life. But it seems she won't let you say no, even if you weren't planning on it anyway, I know I'd stay with her if I were you.

Full Image:
Artist: Securipun (Awesome artist, they make lots of hot ladies...)

Sorry this bio is so short, I might come back to it in the future but I haven't had as much drive to do the things I enjoy lately, so if this is my last character don't be surprised. Make sure to leave a review if you enjoyed, it or if I made a mistake. And suggest characters you wanna see in the future! Love yall.
